summary: Tested Titel-Gruppen (Gewerk-/Titelzusammenstellung) and Discount features. Backend API tests: 9/9 passed. Frontend UI elements verified: Titel hinzufügen button, discount input, hierarchical numbering, Gewerk-/Titelzusammenstellung section all present and functional.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/quotes with type='titel' positions - creates quote correctly
Backend: POST /api/quotes with discount (percent) - calculates correctly
Backend: POST /api/quotes with both titel and discount - excludes titel from calculation
Backend: PUT /api/quotes/{id} with discount - recalculates totals correctly
Backend: GET /api/quotes/{id} - preserves titel positions and discount
Backend: Betreff field saved and retrieved correctly
Backend: PUT /api/orders/{id} with discount - works correctly
Backend: POST /api/invoices with titel and discount - works correctly
Backend: PUT /api/invoices/{id} with discount and deposit - works correctly
Frontend: Titel rows render with amber background (data-testid='titel-row-{idx}')
Frontend: Gewerk-/Titelzusammenstellung section visible in totals area
Frontend: Totals display: Nettosumme, Abschlag, Nettobetrag, MwSt, Brutto
critical_code_review_comments: Code review: WysiwygDocumentEditor.jsx is 1625 lines - consider splitting into smaller components
Minor: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in mobile dropdown (line 697)
seed_data_creation: Created test quote A-2026-0021 with 2 Titel groups, 3 positions, and 3% discount for verification. Quote ID: c288214e-7f81-4832-8ccf-7fa863f65294
context_for_next_testing_agent: Titel-Gruppen and Discount features fully implemented and working. Test quote A-2026-0021 exists with: 2 Titel positions (Einrüstarbeiten, Dachdeckerarbeiten), 3 regular positions, 3% discount. Calculation verified: Subtotal 3050€, Discount 91.50€, Net 2958.50€, VAT 562.12€, Total 3520.61€. Frontend data-testids: btn-add-titel, btn-add-position, discount-input, btn-save-document, wysiwyg-customer-select, titel-row-{idx}, titel-input-{idx}. Hierarchical numbering: Titel gets 1,2,3; positions under Titel get 1.1,1.2,2.1 etc.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working correctly as implemented
